name: doc_id
description: Unique document ID derived from GCS object name

name: transaction_date
description: Date of transaction extracted from receipt (YYYY-MM-DD)

name: merchant_name
description: Name of merchant or vendor from receipt

name: items_json
description: JSON string array of line items [{item_name, quantity, price, total_item_price}]

name: total_amount
description: Total transaction amount (float, no currency symbol)

name: expense_category
description: One of: Raw Materials, Logistics, Utilities, Marketing, Others

name: coach_tip
description: FinVibe Coach 2-sentence financial tip in Bahasa Indonesia

name: gcs_object
description: Full GCS URI of the original receipt image

name: processed_at
description: UTC timestamp when this record was processed
